# ANALYSIS: BASELINE_J_ANCHOR_BACKTEST

**Filed:** 2026-05-22  
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)  
**Type:** analysis  
**Status:** DRAFT (NEEDS-RATIFICATION per Rule 9)

## Hypothesis

Measure baseline engine P&L on all 7 J anchor days to establish current edge_capture before evaluating any strategy changes. This provides the source-of-truth foundation for OP-16 scoring.

## Mechanism

Run current engine (per automation/state/params.json rule_version v14) on each J anchor day using Stage-1 backtest (16-month SPY 5m data filtered to anchor dates). Record engine P&L per day, then compute:
- edge_capture = sum(engine_pnl_on_winning_days) - sum(max(0, engine_loss_on_losing_days))
- Compare to theoretical max (1542) and rejection floor (771)

## OP-20 disclosures

1. **Account-size assumption:** Baseline engine uses position sizing from risk-rules.md. For $1K paper account: 3 contracts (2 TP + 1 runner). P&L values scale linearly with account size; $1K paper ≈ 14% of headline $25K+ requirement.
2. **Sample bias:** Testing only 7 J anchor days (source-of-truth sample). High overfit risk as these days are hand-picked by J; not representative of general market conditions. Selection method: immutable J truth set.
3. **Out-of-sample:** NEEDS-OOS (this analysis is pure in-sample measurement on J days; no walk-forward held-out window performed).
4. **Real-fills:** NEEDS-REAL-FILLS (using BS simulator; real OPRA fill validation not conducted for baseline measurement).
5. **Failure modes:** Worst-case: engine misses all winners (+$1542 edge) and takes full loser losses (-$730) → edge_capture = $1542 - $730 = $812. Best-case: engine takes all winners and skips losers → edge_capture = $1542. Actual baseline unknown.
6. **Concentration:** Not applicable for baseline measurement (no P&L distribution across days yet). Will be computed post-backtest.

## Pre-merge gate

<not applicable for baseline analysis>

## Confidence

0 / 10 -- No backtest executed; this analysis solely documents measurement requirement.

## Pre-existing leaderboard impact

Provides foundation for evaluating all leaderboard candidates. Baseline edge_capture determines whether any candidate clears OP-16 rejection floor (edge_capture ≥ 771). Current leaderboard shows multiple candidates with negative/placeholder edge_capture, suggesting baseline may be sub-771.
